rows.primarySource: lead-intake-tracker.csv plus traceable consent/evidence; optional matching UTM attribution.
rows.requiredProof: real user request, explicit_reply_ok consent, traceable email/thread/proof note, and safe notes without raw sensitive content.
rows.zeroRule: Do not write fake 0 demand from silence; keep blank until the lead window is reviewed, then document checked-zero separately.
rows.decisionUse: Can open owned asset or Luna experiments only after repeated same-guardian demand and matching gates.
rows.safetyBoundary: Do not use this metric to claim diagnosis, therapeutic outcome, guaranteed repair, or required purchase.
